arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the EC2 instance

runningTasksCount.description: The number of running tasks in the cluster

activeServicesCount.description: The number of active services in the cluster

arn.title: ARN
arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the load balancer

dnsName.description: The public DNS name of the load balancer

scheme.title: Scheme
scheme.description: The load balancing scheme (internet-facing or internal)

type.title: Type
type.description: The type of load balancer (application, network, or gateway)

state.title: State
state.description: The current state of the load balancer

vpcId.title: VPC ID
vpcId.description: The ID of the VPC for the load balancer

ipAddressType.title: IP Address Type
ipAddressType.description: The type of IP addresses used by the load balancer (ipv4 or dualstack)

availabilityZones.title: Availability Zones
availabilityZones.description: The Availability Zones for the load balancer

securityGroups.title: Security Groups
securityGroups.description: The IDs of the security groups for the load balancer

createdTime.title: Created Time

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Tags associated with the load balancer
